top_signals.title: ECB announces main milestones for roll-out of Integrated Reporting Framework
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asia Stock Rally Falters Ahead of Rate Decisions: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks wavered as investors paused to assess the durability of the relief rally fueled by the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, while awaiting rate decisions in Australia and Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gulf recalibrates as Iran emerges intact from war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Gulf recalibrates as Iran emerges intact from war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cyberattack on Russian tech firm Astral disrupts business, government services for week
top_signals.summary: According to customer complaints, the disruption affected a range of services used by businesses, leading to interruptions in cash register operations, difficulties selling certain regulated goods, loss of access to customer portals and corporate email and problems with electronic human resources document management systems and authentication using digital certificates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
